Your rights deserve

aboutStoryEn:
Welcome to the Justice First Law Associates of Raja Mazhar Waheed Khan: Advocate of the Supreme Court of Azad Jammu & Kashmir, and one of the most experienced legal practitioners in the region. For over two decades, this chamber has stood at the intersection of law, justice, and public service — providing principled, effective, and accessible legal representation to individuals, families, businesses, and the State.

Founded on a simple but powerful belief — that every person, regardless of background or means, deserves a lawyer who will fight hard for their rights — our practice has grown from the subordinate courts of AJK to the highest bench of the Supreme Court. We have appeared in constitutional matters, landmark service disputes, sensitive family cases, and complex civil litigation, bringing the same rigour and commitment to every client we serve.

"A good lawyer does not just know the law — he understands people, reads situations, and finds the path to justice that others miss."

Raja Mazhar Waheed Khan served as Additional Advocate General to the Government of Azad Kashmir from 2022 to 2025 — representing the State before the Supreme Court and High Court — bringing an insider's understanding of how government and the judiciary interact. He has also served as Legal Advisor to SERRA, Government of Pakistan, and as a Visiting Faculty Member at the University of Azad Jammu & Kashmir's Law Department for nearly 18 years, shaping the legal minds of the next generation.

This is not just a law practice. It is a commitment — to the rule of law, to the people of Azad Kashmir, and to the principle that justice, pursued with skill and integrity, can be achieved.
aboutStoryUr:
انصاف کوئی استحقاق نہیں ہے۔

یہ آپ کا حق ہے۔
aboutMission:
To provide every client with honest, fearless, and expert legal representation — making the law accessible, understandable, and effective for the people of Azad Jammu & Kashmir and beyond.

Deliver strategic legal counsel grounded in 20+ years of courtroom experience
Represent clients with integrity at every level, from district courts to the Supreme Court
Protect fundamental rights, civil liberties, and legal entitlements of every client
Make quality legal services accessible to individuals, families, and businesses across AJK
Resolve disputes efficiently, through litigation, arbitration, or mediation, based on what serves the client best
aboutVision:
To be the most trusted legal chamber in Azad Jammu & Kashmir — recognised not just for winning cases, but for upholding justice, advancing the rule of law, and setting the standard for ethical and professional legal practice in the region.

Build a legal practice synonymous with integrity, excellence, and results in AJK
Contribute to a stronger, fairer, and more accessible justice system in Azad Kashmir
Mentor and inspire the next generation of legal professionals through education and example
Expand legal awareness so citizens of AJK know their rights and how to protect them
Become the first choice for complex, high-stakes legal matters across all courts in Pakistan
mpBio:
Raja Mazhar Waheed Khan is a Senior Advocate of the Supreme Court of Azad Jammu & Kashmir, bringing over two decades of distinguished legal practice to the most complex constitutional, civil, and public law matters before the region's highest tribunals.

In AJK's legal landscape, he served as Additional Advocate General to the Government of Azad Kashmir from 2022 to 2025, representing the State before the Supreme Court and High Court, and held a decade-long tenure as Legal Advisor to SERRA, Government of Pakistan.

Beyond the courtroom, Raja Mazhar has shaped the next generation of legal professionals as Visiting Faculty at the University of Azad Jammu & Kashmir's Law Department for nearly 18 years, where he brings practitioner's insight into the academic study of law.

He holds an LLM from the University of Azad Jammu & Kashmir and his foundational law degree from Sind Muslim Government Law College, Karachi University, as a combination that grounds his practice in both regional jurisprudence and the broader national legal framework of Pakistan.

team.name: Zakriya Abbasi
team.desc:
Hi, there. I'm a Law student for the future, Advocate for Justice and A voice for the voiceless. My legal studies gave me strong skills in many areas, making me ready to tackle any legal challenge with smarts and know-how in accordance with the principles of law.
I have gained foundational knowledge across various legal practice areas including commercial contracts, securities law, labor and employment, intellectual property, litigation, real estate, immigration, data privacy, finance, mergers and acquisitions, corporate law, equity administration, and entertainment law. 
My studies have provided insights into key legal principles and regulations within these fields, enhancing my ability to analyze complex issues and contribute valuable perspectives on a wide range of legal matters.

services.desc: Protecting your fundamental rights guaranteed under the Constitution of Pakistan and AJK. Whether you face unlawful detention, violation of basic rights, or need to challenge a government action, we bring constitutional petitions before the High Court and Supreme Court of Azad Kashmir to secure justice at the highest level.
